features: Package Contents - - Include 2 packs Black compatible 83X CF283X toner cartridges. Compatible for 83A CF283A 83X CF283X toner cartridges.

Compatible Printers - - Suitable for use in HP LaserJet Pro M201 M201dw M201n, HP LaserJet Pro MFP M127 M127fn M127fw, HP LaserJet Pro MFP M125 M125a M125nw, HP LaserJet Pro MFP M225 M225dn M225dn M225dw M225dw printers.
High Print Yields - - Up to 2,200 pages per black toner cartridge, 5% coverage at A4 pager, based on ISO / IEC 19752.
Print Advantages - - Refined toner powder and high-quality cartridge, deliver accurate bright color, sharp black and crisp graphics.
Reliable Warranty - - Timely after-sales and quality assurance services, let you to enjoy the fun of printing easily.
